builderStatic.notes: Live Builder surface was reverified on faktura: hasBuilder/hasComponents/hasUiPanel true, propertiesPanel.showById available, and a fresh tabs snapshot was captured.

templateInstance.notes: Canonical Builder scan, DOM audit, tabs map, live plugin inventory, and repo sync diff were refreshed after the clean-runtime draft sync. Plugin embeds match current dist by exact hash readback, embed10 now uses CarrdPluginOptions, and embed14 was preserved untouched.

reason: Builder-side scan package and runtime sync were refreshed on 2026-06-30. The current Builder draft is aligned with repo dist, but the published site remains behind until operator publish and post-publish verification.
